buckets.label: Productive-equipment input starvation
buckets.summary: 8/10 active flow Devices accumulated 257.9 event-backed inter-job input-gap device-s inside 1184.9 device-s of observed production opportunity; 1179.1 of 1437.0 flow input-wait device-s lay outside those ranked gaps, with 232.0 additional exception-only device-s excluded from ranking.

buckets.label: Verified yield and quality loss
buckets.summary: 10/12 inspected lots passed first inspection; 2 reworked, 0 scrapped, 0 escaped, and 0 lot-derived output units were lost. Mode controls prevented 1/3 authored defect instances across 1 lots. 1 defect-origin contributors are traceable; etch-cell-layer-2 leads with 0 scrap dispositions.

buckets.label: Tracked-lot queue congestion
buckets.summary: Tracked lots averaged 5.9 s queued in a 62.6 s cycle; burn-in-1 is the measured bottleneck context.

buckets.label: Maintenance and qualification
buckets.summary: 8 maintenance and 8 qualification completions consumed 124.0 service/wait device-s; 0 phases were cancelled.

buckets.label: Release and admission
buckets.summary: 0 scheduled lots remained pending; 0 capacity-blocked and 6 control-blocked releases accumulated 177.3 lot-s.

buckets.label: Setup and campaign control
buckets.summary: 4 changeovers and 0 campaign holds consumed 18.0 equipment-s.

buckets.label: Physical transport blocking
buckets.summary: Tracked lots averaged 9.0 s in necessary transit (context only); 1/17 physical lanes accumulated 0.1 blocked item-s.

fabLoss.caveat: Bucket scores are deterministic ranking signals derived from overlapping measured delays and losses; they are not additive units of foregone output or calibrated causal estimates.

iterations.expectedEffect: Improve facility-interruption delivery while preserving every current-best locked-case score through one device-local dispatch policy.
iterations.hypothesis: The independently qualified layer-two lithography bay can sequence ready re-entrant lots by contract due date, protecting interrupted campaigns without disturbing the FIFO discipline of the shared front-end route.
